calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-20-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Urbatsch (Counsel for Maria Selmark, Trustee).

The Court expressed its concern with the fees requested. Mr Urbatsch explained the circumstances of the case, including the difficulty the Trustee has had in managing the affairs of the Special Needs Trust. There then ensued a discussion concerning the mechanics and need for the termination of the special needs trust. After said discussion, the Court granted the Petition approving the accounting, fees, and termination of the trust. The Order for same, as revised, was signed in open court.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: Deputy Rigo Guitron; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.
